config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary, because that is exactly how abuse and authoritarianism start. In my view, the role of society is to protect people and create fair rules, not to override personal rights whenever it is convenient. A healthy society needs both collective responsibility and strong protections for the individual.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “kebaikan bersama” dipakai tanpa batas, itu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk menekan kebebasan sipil, menyensor suara yang tidak populer, atau mengorbankan kelompok kecil demi mayoritas. Tentu saja ada keadaan di mana masyarakat perlu membatasi tindakan individu, seperti soal keselamatan publik atau mencegah bahaya nyata, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Bagi saya, hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu fondasi agar masyarakat tetap adil dan tidak sewenang-wenang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the idea that society should automatically come first, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “the public interest” can be used to silence ordinary people or excuse unfair treatment. Society does matter, and there are moments when individual freedom must be limited for real safety or public order, but those limits should be narrow and accountable, not a blanket excuse to override rights. If the individual has no protection, then the society being defended is not fair, it is just powerful. For me, the better principle is that society and individual rights should balance each other, with rights as the baseline, not the casualty.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari pengalaman Amerika, saya melihat betapa mudahnya “kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi mayoritas, atau perluasan kekuasaan negara yang tidak perlu; jadi saya tidak percaya pada slogan itu tanpa batasan yang sangat ketat. Memang ada situasi seperti keselamatan publik, tetapi pembatasannya harus spesifik, sementara, dan bisa diuji, bukan alasan untuk mengorbankan hak dasar. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru bergantung pada hak individu yang kuat, karena tanpa itu “kepentingan masyarakat” hanya berarti kehendak pihak yang paling berkuasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement as a general rule, because in Indonesia the phrase "kepentingan masyarakat" is too often used to justify pressure on people who are already weak. Public order and safety do matter, but they do not give the state or the majority a blank check to ignore basic rights, especially when the harm is vague or the target is unpopular. A society that sacrifices individual rights too easily is not becoming stronger; it is just making power less accountable. For me, the right balance is that society can limit individuals only in narrow, clearly justified cases, while individual rights stay the default protection.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya “kepentingan masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi mayoritas, atau perluasan kuasa negara yang berlebihan. Memang ada keadaan darurat atau soal keselamatan publik di mana hak individu bisa dibatasi, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji, bukan dipakai sebagai alasan serba guna. Jika hak individu dianggap nomor dua, yang sering terjadi bukan masyarakat yang lebih adil, melainkan pihak yang paling kuat semakin leluasa menentukan aturan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru bergantung pada hak individu yang kuat sebagai batas terhadap penyalahgunaan kekuasaan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
